---
title: "TPM Plots"
params:                              
  experiment_id: SET_COMPS
  run_date: 2026-02-18
  author: "Shalise Burch"
output: html_document  
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: TRUE        
    warning: FALSE     
    message: FALSE     
---



## Set up
```{r libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# *Last updated:*
# 2026-02-18 20:04 SAB ------------------------------

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(reshape2)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(colorspace)


results_path <- here("rnaseq", "S3_S4_COMP", "results")
rdata_path <- "rdata"
source(here("rnaseq", "S3_S4_COMP", "functions.R"))

save_dir <- file.path(results_path, "TPMs")
make_subdir(save_dir)

pal_group <- c(
  "D21_CTRL" = "#999999",
  "T21_CTRL" = lighten("#999999", 0.5),
  "D21_RA"   = "#D55E00",
  "T21_RA"   = lighten("#D55E00", 0.5)
)

```


## -------------------------
# SAB01 - TPM PLOTS
##### read TPM file
```{r TPM}
tpm_path <- file.path(save_dir, "SAB01 (SET3)")
make_subdir(tpm_path)

exp_name <- "SAB01"

metadata <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB01/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB01_metadataFinal.rds")

star_salmon_path <- "/Volumes/project/imoskowitz/shared/sequencing.processed/20240412_LH00315_0161_B222TJLLT1-XRS-Pl21-IM-RS54-hg38/star_salmon"

tpm_file  <- file.path(star_salmon_path, "salmon.merged.gene_tpm.tsv")
tpm_raw <- read_tsv(tpm_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

#  Use gene_id as rownames
if (!"gene_id" %in% colnames(tpm_raw)) {
  stop("TPM file is missing required column: gene_id")
}
ann_cols <- intersect(c("gene_id","gene_name"), colnames(tpm_raw))

# If  duplicated gene_ids, aggregate to keep a 1:1 gene row
if (any(duplicated(tpm_raw$gene_id))) {
  cols_to_agg <- setdiff(colnames(tpm_raw), ann_cols)
  tpm_raw <- tpm_raw %>%
    group_by(gene_id) %>%
    summarize(across(all_of(cols_to_agg), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")
  message("Duplicated gene_ids detected — values aggregated by mean.")
}

# Build numeric TPM matrix
tpm <- as.data.frame(tpm_raw)
rownames(tpm) <- tpm$gene_id
tpm <- tpm[ , setdiff(colnames(tpm), ann_cols), drop = FALSE]
tpm <- readr::type_convert(tpm, na = c("", "NA", "NaN")) # Ensure numeric

# align sample names
meta_samples <- metadata$sampleID
if (!all(meta_samples %in% colnames(tpm))) {
  # try stripping "{exp_name}_"
  tpm_cols_try <- sub(paste0("^", exp_name, "_"), "", colnames(tpm))
  if (all(meta_samples %in% tpm_cols_try)) {
    colnames(tpm) <- tpm_cols_try
    message("Stripped experiment prefix from TPM column names for alignment.")
  } else {
    stop("TPM column names do not match metadata$sampleID, even after cleaning.\n",
         "First TPM cols: ", paste(head(colnames(tpm)), collapse = ", "), "\n",
         "First metadata IDs: ", paste(head(meta_samples), collapse = ", "))
  }
}

# reorder to match metadata
tpm <- tpm[, meta_samples, drop = FALSE]
if (!identical(colnames(tpm), meta_samples)) {
  stop("TPM columns could not be reordered to match metadata$sampleID order.")
}

#assess coverage
missing_in_tpm <- setdiff(meta_samples, colnames(tpm))
extra_in_tpm   <- setdiff(colnames(tpm), meta_samples)

if (length(missing_in_tpm)) {
  warning("Samples present in metadata but missing from TPMs: ",
          paste(missing_in_tpm, collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(extra_in_tpm)) {
  message("Extra TPM columns not present in metadata (will be ignored): ",
          paste(extra_in_tpm, collapse = ", "))
}

```


## Run function
```{r }
data_path <- here("rnaseq", "S3_S4_COMP", "results", "D4")
labels_xlsx <- file.path(data_path, "S3_S4_COMP_D4_crossContrast_overlap_2026-02-18.xlsx")
sheets <- c("Shared", "Only_T21RA_vs_D21RA")

for (sh in sheets) {

  out_dir <- file.path(tpm_path, sh)  
  make_subdir(out_dir)

  df <- readxl::read_excel(labels_xlsx, sheet = sh)
  names(df) <- tolower(gsub("\\s+", "_", names(df)))

  if (!"gene" %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Sheet ", sh, " is missing a 'gene' column")
  }

  genes <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gene) & gene != "") %>%
    dplyr::pull(gene) %>%
    unique()

  present <- genes[genes %in% rownames(tpm)]
  missing <- setdiff(genes, present)

  if (length(missing)) {
    message("(", sh, ") TPM missing ", length(missing),
            " genes (showing up to 10): ",
            paste(head(missing, 10), collapse = ", "))
  }

  plot_TPM_for_genes(genes_of_interest = present, tpm = tpm,metadata = metadata,  
    out_dir = out_dir, log10_y = FALSE, pal_group = pal_group
  )
}
```


## -------------------------
# SAB08 - TPM PLOTS
##### read TPM file
```{r TPM}
tpm_path <- file.path(save_dir, "SAB08 (SET4)")
make_subdir(tpm_path)

exp_name <- "SAB08"

metadata <- readRDS("/Users/shalise/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-TheUniversityofChicago/R_Studio/SAB08/rnaseq/03_rdata/SAB08_metadataFinal.rds")

star_salmon_path <- "/Volumes/project/imoskowitz/shared/sequencing.processed/SAB08/star_salmon"


tpm_file  <- file.path(star_salmon_path, "salmon.merged.gene_tpm.tsv")
tpm_raw <- read_tsv(tpm_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

#  Use gene_id as rownames
if (!"gene_id" %in% colnames(tpm_raw)) {
  stop("TPM file is missing required column: gene_id")
}
ann_cols <- intersect(c("gene_id","gene_name"), colnames(tpm_raw))

# If  duplicated gene_ids, aggregate to keep a 1:1 gene row
if (any(duplicated(tpm_raw$gene_id))) {
  cols_to_agg <- setdiff(colnames(tpm_raw), ann_cols)
  tpm_raw <- tpm_raw %>%
    group_by(gene_id) %>%
    summarize(across(all_of(cols_to_agg), ~ mean(.x, na.rm = TRUE)), .groups = "drop")
  message("Duplicated gene_ids detected — values aggregated by mean.")
}

# Build numeric TPM matrix
tpm <- as.data.frame(tpm_raw)
rownames(tpm) <- tpm$gene_id
tpm <- tpm[ , setdiff(colnames(tpm), ann_cols), drop = FALSE]
tpm <- readr::type_convert(tpm, na = c("", "NA", "NaN")) # Ensure numeric

# align sample names
meta_samples <- metadata$sampleID
if (!all(meta_samples %in% colnames(tpm))) {
  # try stripping "{exp_name}_"
  tpm_cols_try <- sub(paste0("^", exp_name, "_"), "", colnames(tpm))
  if (all(meta_samples %in% tpm_cols_try)) {
    colnames(tpm) <- tpm_cols_try
    message("Stripped experiment prefix from TPM column names for alignment.")
  } else {
    stop("TPM column names do not match metadata$sampleID, even after cleaning.\n",
         "First TPM cols: ", paste(head(colnames(tpm)), collapse = ", "), "\n",
         "First metadata IDs: ", paste(head(meta_samples), collapse = ", "))
  }
}

# reorder to match metadata
tpm <- tpm[, meta_samples, drop = FALSE]
if (!identical(colnames(tpm), meta_samples)) {
  stop("TPM columns could not be reordered to match metadata$sampleID order.")
}

#assess coverage
missing_in_tpm <- setdiff(meta_samples, colnames(tpm))
extra_in_tpm   <- setdiff(colnames(tpm), meta_samples)

if (length(missing_in_tpm)) {
  warning("Samples present in metadata but missing from TPMs: ",
          paste(missing_in_tpm, collapse = ", "))
}

if (length(extra_in_tpm)) {
  message("Extra TPM columns not present in metadata (will be ignored): ",
          paste(extra_in_tpm, collapse = ", "))
}

```


## Run function
```{r }
data_path <- here("rnaseq", "S3_S4_COMP", "results", "D4")
labels_xlsx <- file.path(data_path, "S3_S4_COMP_D4_crossContrast_overlap_2026-02-18.xlsx")
sheets <- c("Shared", "Only_T21RA_vs_D21RA")

for (sh in sheets) {

  out_dir <- file.path(tpm_path, sh)  
  make_subdir(out_dir)

  df <- readxl::read_excel(labels_xlsx, sheet = sh)
  names(df) <- tolower(gsub("\\s+", "_", names(df)))

  if (!"gene" %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Sheet ", sh, " is missing a 'gene' column")
  }

  genes <- df %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(gene) & gene != "") %>%
    dplyr::pull(gene) %>%
    unique()

  present <- genes[genes %in% rownames(tpm)]
  missing <- setdiff(genes, present)

  if (length(missing)) {
    message("(", sh, ") TPM missing ", length(missing),
            " genes (showing up to 10): ",
            paste(head(missing, 10), collapse = ", "))
  }

  plot_TPM_for_genes(genes_of_interest = present, tpm = tpm,metadata = metadata,  
    out_dir = out_dir, log10_y = FALSE, pal_group = pal_group
  )
}
```
